summary: Read-only consensus recheck inspected the revised unfinished improvement review, AGENTS protocol, and accepted DinoBrain user-intent memories; verdict AGREE that the revised document captures the desired completion plan while explicitly not claiming implementation completion.
decisions: The revised document is acceptable as a completion-plan contract because it covers pre-response/fail-closed, source/provenance, dynamic RAG, behavior recall, backlog/lifecycle, sync safety, install equivalence, Observatory parity, and ten-agent consensus without claiming DinoBrain is complete.
next_steps: Continue the remaining ten-agent consensus loop against this exact revision and implement the hard-gated work packages.
